attributes.best_description:
-The session is for Figure Skaters FS1 or higher.
-Priority of right of way is in the following order:
          1) Skaters in Programs
          2) Skaters in Lesson
          3) All other freestyle skaters
-Please be mindful of your surroundings


Freestyle Rules:

- All Skaters must check in at Front desk before entering Ice
- NO Virtual/Zoom Lessons
- NO Refunds, Credits, Session changes or exchanges.
- NO Waitlist for Full Sessions

Division 3 - Teams should consist of mid-level players. In example: played in the ACHA (Div 2 or Div 3). In addition, these teams could consist of former high-level youth players (AA or A). 18-Game regular season.

Sharks Ice Adult Hockey 101! Whether you are new to the game of looking to shake off some rust you have come to the right place. If you want to learn the game before entering our Division 9 Beginner League, Hockey 101 is a great place to start!

Sharks Ice Hockey 101!

Limited to three goalies per session. Full goaltending equipment is required.
